images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, featuring flawless skin texture with visible pores and faint vellus hair, large expressive eyes, and a fit, curvy body. She is wearing a delicate silk slip dress with thin spaghetti straps, the smooth fabric clinging to her ample chest and slim waist, accentuating her youthful curves. She stands inside a subway train, the modern interior blurred in the background to create a soft bokeh effect, while the melancholic and deep mood is enhanced by pastel soft colors and a disco ball reflection casting bright, clear, professional light across her face. She looks directly into the camera with an intense, deep gaze, her expression full of emotion. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
